nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified spelling of   John   or a short form of   Jonathan .  The name is borne by the Canadian singer  Jon Vickers  (  b. 1926 ) and the American actor  Jon Voight  (  b. 1938 ).

variants.name: Jonathan
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘God has given’, composed of the same elements as those of   Matthew  , but in reverse order. This is the name of several characters in the Bible, most notably a son of King Saul, who was a devoted friend and supporter of the young David, even when David and Saul were themselves at loggerheads (1 Samuel 31; 2 Samuel 1:19–26). The name is often taken as symbolic of steadfast friendship and loyalty. Well-known bearers of the name include the Irish clergyman and writer  Jonathan Swift  (  1667-1745 ), British theatre director  Jonathan Miller  (  b. 1934 ), British actor  Jonathan Pryce  (  b. 1947 ), and British television presenter  Jonathan Ross  (  b. 1960 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: Leiningen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name for someone from any of several places called Leiningen.

en.lifeSummary: When Jolenta von Leiningen was born in 1350, her father, Frederick VII von Leiningen, was 26 and her mother, Jolanthe von Jülich, was 21. She had at least 2 sons with Arnoud I van Egmond. She died on 24 April 1434, at the age of 84, and was buried in The Hague, South Holland, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jolenta von Leiningen est née en 1350, son père, Frederick VII von Leiningen, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Jolanthe von Jülich, avait 21 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec Arnoud I van Egmond. Elle est décédée le 24 avril 1434, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterrée à La Haye, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas.

de.Honingen, Pfalz, Bavaria, Germany: Höningen, Altleiningen, Landkreis Bad Dürkheim, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Jolenta von Leiningen 1350 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Frederick VII von Leiningen 26 und ihre Mutter Jolanthe von Jülich 21. Sie hatte mit Arnoud I van Egmond mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 24. April 1434 im Alter von 84 Jahren und wurde in Den Haag, Südholland, Niederlande begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jolenta von Leiningen è nata il nel 1350, sua padre, Frederick VII von Leiningen, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Jolanthe von Jülich, aveva 21 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con Arnoud I van Egmond. Morì il 24 aprile 1434, all'età di 84 anni, e fu sepolta a Den Haag, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi.

ko.lifeSummary: Jolenta von Leiningen(이)가 1350년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Frederick VII von Leiningen(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jolanthe von Jülich(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 Arnoud I van Egmond(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1434년 4월 24일 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 든 하아그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jolenta von Leiningen nasceu em 1350, seu pai, Frederick VII von Leiningen, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Jolanthe von Jülich, tinha 21 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Arnoud I van Egmond. Ela faleceu em 24 de abril de 1434, com 84 anos, e foi sepultada em Den Haag, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jolenta von Leiningen родилась в 1350 г., её отцу по имени Frederick VII von Leiningen было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Jolanthe von Jülich, 21. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от Arnoud I van Egmond. Она умерла 24 апреля 1434 г. в возрасте 84 лет и была похоронена в местности ден хааг, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды.
